name: @rune-langium/codegen-worker
description: Legacy Cloudflare Worker fronting the JVM rosetta-code-generators container (feature 011-export-code-cf). Superseded by the Langium-native @rune-langium/codegen, which the studio runs server-side in its /api/codegen Pages Function (apps/studio/functions/api/codegen.ts). Retained for reference and NOT deployed in prod.
author: Pradeep Mouli <pmouli@mac.com> (https://github.com/pradeepmouli)
